name: tekautomate-mcp
description: AI-powered Tektronix oscilloscope control — SCPI lookup, live instrument control, screenshots, and workflow automation.
long_description:
TekAutomate MCP connects Claude Desktop to a locally running TekAutomate MCP server.

Features:
- SCPI command search across a built-in Tektronix corpus
- Live instrument control via VISA (requires TekAutomateExecutor running locally)
- Scope screenshot capture and vision analysis
- Workflow building and step proposal
- RAG-backed knowledge retrieval from Tektronix documentation

Requires TekAutomate to be running on your PC (starts the MCP server automatically on localhost:8787). TekAutomateExecutor.exe must also be running to enable live instrument features.

tools.name: send_scpi
tools.description: Execute SCPI on live instrument (requires executor)

tools.name: get_instrument_info
tools.description: Get connected instrument info and status

tools.name: tek_router
tools.description: AI gateway — workflow build, search, and execution

tools.name: retrieve_rag_chunks
tools.description: RAG knowledge retrieval from Tektronix docs

tools.name: discover_scpi
tools.description: Snapshot and diff instrument state via *LRN?
